title: -<[Zareh's Optimizeds]>-
description: "-<[Zareh's Optimized]>-" is a modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s performance and visuals without compromising gameplay, combining optimization, graphical improvements, and compatibility with Fabric 1.21.4.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c26e9e95c7c7b496b0b90b005e7da1e0e1d0368c.png)

---  

## **🌟 About the Modpack**  

-<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- is a meticulously crafted **client-side** modpack designed to **maximize performance, enhance graphics, and refine gameplay mechanics** while preserving the core essence of Minecraft. Whether you’re running the game on a high-end PC or an older machine, this modpack ensures that you get a **fluid, visually stunning, and optimized** Minecraft experience without unnecessary bloat.  

This is not your typical modpack filled with heavy gameplay overhauls—**it is fully compatible with vanilla servers and does not require server-side installations**. You can hop onto your favorite servers or single-player worlds without any concerns, enjoying all the enhancements that -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- provides while others continue to play normally.  

Our focus is on **improving FPS, reducing memory usage, enhancing graphics, and introducing quality-of-life features** that make the game feel smoother and more immersive. With the perfect balance between **aesthetic upgrades and performance boosts**, this modpack is the ideal choice for players who want to experience **Minecraft at its best** without altering the fundamental gameplay mechanics.  


This Is the Version:

![1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d401638c674cab26898177455c6f952cb2fee6e7.png)

---  

![Is Client Side!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86c4ad7ea57cd213fea6e6e0971b730466e2eb3a.png)

## **🚀 Why Choose -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>-?**  

### **🔥 Extreme Performance Optimization**  
Minecraft is notorious for being **poorly optimized**, even on high-end machines. To combat this, -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- includes a suite of **powerful performance-enhancing mods** that dramatically improve FPS, reduce lag, and optimize world loading without sacrificing visuals. Some of these essential mods include:  

✅ **Sodium & Lithium** – A powerful alternative to OptiFine, significantly improving graphics performance and game stability.  
✅ **Phosphor & Starlight** – Optimizes the lighting engine, eliminating stutters and lag caused by chunk updates.  
✅ **FerriteCore** – Reduces memory consumption, allowing the game to run more efficiently, especially on lower-end systems.  
✅ **MemoryLeakFix & Smooth Boot** – Helps fix RAM leaks and reduces startup time for a seamless experience.  

With these optimizations, you can expect **higher frame rates, smoother chunk loading, and significantly reduced RAM usage**, making Minecraft more playable on any setup.  

### **🎨 Stunning Visual Enhancements**  
While performance is the priority, that doesn’t mean we ignore visuals! This modpack includes a curated selection of **resource packs and shaders** that enhance the **lighting, textures, and atmospheric effects** without causing significant FPS drops.  

✨ **Resource Packs:**  
- High-quality **HD textures** that maintain the original aesthetic of Minecraft.  
- Enhanced **UI and item textures** for better readability and immersion.  
- Optimized **block and entity models** that improve realism without overloading your system.  

🌄 **Shaders:**  
- Multiple shader pack options **optimized for different PC specifications**.  
- **Dynamic lighting, realistic shadows, and atmospheric fog** that add depth to the world.  
- A perfect blend of **beauty and performance**, ensuring smooth gameplay even with shaders enabled.  

### **🛠️ Quality-of-Life Upgrades**  
Aside from visual and performance enhancements, -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- introduces a set of **gameplay refinements** that make playing more enjoyable without altering the core mechanics. These include:  

✔️ **Minimap & Waypoints** – Never get lost again! Easily track your position and set waypoints.  
✔️ **Improved HUD & UI Enhancements** – A more informative and clean interface for better control.  
✔️ **Better Controls & Hotkeys** – Improved keybindings and settings for a more intuitive experience.  
✔️ **Minor Tweaks & Bug Fixes** – Small adjustments that make the game feel smoother and more polished.  

### **🌍 Multiplayer & Server Compatibility**  
A major advantage of -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- is that it is **entirely client-side**, meaning you can use it **on any server** without needing special permissions or modifications. Whether you’re playing on a **vanilla SMP, a modded server, or even competitive PvP**, this modpack will work seamlessly.  

✅ **No unfair gameplay advantages** – This is not a cheat or exploit-based modpack.  
✅ **Compatible with Vanilla and Modded Servers** – Works without conflicts or requiring additional server modifications.  
✅ **Lightweight and Flexible** – Can be customized further based on personal preferences.  

---  

![FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dbdaf60fe97d2f8feef382e9bcf23f76084c309.png)### 

### **1️⃣ What makes -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- different from other modpacks?**  
Unlike most modpacks that introduce heavy game-changing features, -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- focuses purely on **performance, visual quality, and gameplay fluidity** without modifying core mechanics. It is a **client-side modpack**, meaning you can join any server without needing server-side modifications.  

### **2️⃣ Will this modpack work on low-end PCs?**  
Absolutely! This modpack is specifically **optimized for all hardware configurations**, from low-end systems to high-end gaming rigs. Mods like **Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore** drastically reduce memory consumption and CPU/GPU load, making Minecraft much more playable on weaker machines.  

### **3️⃣ Does this modpack support OptiFine?**  
No, OptiFine is not included because **Sodium + Iris (for shaders) provide better optimization and performance than OptiFine**. However, you can manually install OptiFine if you prefer using it.  

### **4️⃣ Can I add my own mods to this modpack?**  
Yes! This modpack is designed to be **flexible**. You can easily add or remove mods to tailor the experience to your liking. However, be aware that adding heavy mods could impact performance.  

### **5️⃣ How do I install the modpack?**  
**Installing -<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- is simple:**  
1. Install **Fabric** or **Forge** (depending on the version provided).  
2. Copy all the mods into your `mods` folder inside `.minecraft`.  
3. Apply the resource packs and shaders from the Minecraft settings menu.  
4. Adjust graphics settings based on your PC’s performance.  
5. Launch the game and enjoy a **smooth, visually enhanced Minecraft experience!**  

### **6️⃣ Is this modpack safe to use?**  
Yes! Every mod included in this pack has been tested and verified to be **safe, clean, and widely used by the community**. There are no hacks, cheats, or malicious software.  

### **7️⃣ Can I use this modpack in multiplayer?**  
Yes! Since all mods are **client-side**, you can use them on any server **without violating server rules**. You will get all the benefits of enhanced performance, visuals, and gameplay improvements while still playing fairly with others.  

---  

This modpack was created with passion and precision to **bring out the best in Minecraft without altering its core gameplay**. Whether you’re a casual builder, a PvP enthusiast, or a survival adventurer, **-<[Minecraft: Zareh’s Optimized]>- is the ultimate way to experience Minecraft at its peak performance.**  

Enjoy smooth, stunning, and seamless Minecraft like never before! 🚀🔥
